greeting: I can help you quickly process employee call-ins and manage their scheduled shifts. Just tell me who called out, and I'll handle the rest, from accruals to opening the shift for coverage.

suggestedPrompts.title: Mark Call-In PTO
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Mark Susan Jones as a call-in for today's 09:00 shift using PTO.

suggestedPrompts.title: Call-In Unpaid
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Mark Michael Reed as called out, code it as Unpaid.

suggestedPrompts.title: Call-In Low Balance
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Susanne Jones called out for her shift on 2026-02-03. Apply PTO.

suggestedPrompts.title: Specific Shift ID
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Mark employee E12345 as a call-in for shift SFT1001, use SICK hours.
